productDisplayName: Maxima Men White Dial Chronograph Watch
description: Case style: Stainless steel round case Dial style: White and silver coloured dial with silver and white coloured hands  Strap style: Steel strap with butterfly clasp Features: Three dials on the face with a tachymeter along the rim, branding on the 3 hour mark, screw to reset time, buttons to adjust stopwatch, date aperture at the 3 hour mark Waterproof to 3 ATM, wearable around sinks and in mild rains Warranty:  1 year
